name: Zheng_Shuzu_Taiji_shan_shi_ren_ti_zi_rubbing_UCB244561.xml
title_en: Zheng Shuzu Taiji shan shi ren ti zi (rubbing)
title_zh: 太基山(大基山)石人題字（拓本）
date_text: Catalogued 565 (see caveat). 'Taiji shan' here = Daji shan 大基山 (Laizhou/Pingdu, Shandong), site of Zheng Daozhao's Daoist altar (中明壇/仙壇) inscriptions.
repository: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley

name: Zheng_Shuzu_Tianzhu_shan_ming_e_rubbing_UCB244548.xml
title_en: Zheng Shuzu Tianzhu shan ming e (title-portion) (rubbing)
title_zh: 天柱山銘 (額) / 鄭叔祖天柱山銘額（拓本）
date_text: Dated 565 in record (post-dates Zheng Daozhao's death 516); traditionally the Tianzhu shan 天柱山 group is assigned to Zheng Daozhao's Yunfeng/Tianzhu cliff project of c.511-516 — the catalogue date should be treated cautiously.
repository: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley

name: Zheng_Shuzu_Tianzhu_shan_ming_rubbing_UCB244549.xml
